query:
SELECT DISTINCT research_field FROM professors WHERE research_field IS NOT NULL ORDER BY research_field;
SELECT DISTINCT university_name FROM professors ORDER BY university_name;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w6DdBww2bzwyZZ.root --database hB2F5YxeXakQRcL5WU36Vw --execute SELECT DISTINCT research_field FROM professors WHERE research_field IS NOT NULL ORDER BY research_field;
